---
title: "EDA — Pesticides & Health Outcomes SP 2014–2024"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    code-fold: true
    self-contained: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Setup

```{r}
library(DataExplorer)
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(skimr)

df_complete <- read_parquet("resultados/base_consolidada_sp_2014_2024.parquet")
```

## Skimr summary

```{r}
skim(df_complete)
```

## 1. Data quality & completeness audit

```{r}
plot_missing(df_complete)
```

## 2. Distribution of health outcome rates

```{r}
plot_histogram(df_complete[, c("taxa_hosp_100k", "taxa_notif_100k", "taxa_obitos_sim_100k")])
plot_qq(df_complete[, c("taxa_hosp_100k", "taxa_notif_100k")])
```

## 3. Correlation structure between exposure proxies

```{r}
exposure_vars <- df_complete |>
  select(pam_area_colhida_ha, censo_pct_uso_agrotox, censo_valor_agrotox_mil,
         sisagua_pct_deteccao, caged_admissoes_agro, pct_rural_2022)

plot_correlation(exposure_vars, type = "continuous")
```

## 4. Vulnerability index cross-correlation and PCA

```{r}
vuln_vars <- df_complete |>
  select(ivs, ivs_capital_humano, ivs_renda_e_trabalho,
         ibp_deprivation_mean, ipvs_pct_grupo5, ipvs_pct_grupo6,
         t_analf_15m, i_gini, renda_per_capita) |>
  distinct()

plot_correlation(vuln_vars)
plot_prcomp(vuln_vars, variance_cap = 0.9)
```

## 5. Exposure vs. outcome scatter (stratified by rural category)

```{r}
df_complete_rural <- df_complete |>
  mutate(rural_cat = cut(pct_rural_2022,
                         breaks = c(-Inf, 10, 30, 100),
                         labels = c("Urban", "Mixed", "Rural")))

plot_scatterplot(df_complete_rural, by = "taxa_notif_100k", sampled_rows = 2000)
```

## 6. Temporal profile

```{r}
df_complete |>
  group_by(ano) |>
  summarise(across(c(sih_n_hosp, sinan_n_notif, sim_n_obitos,
                     caged_admissoes_agro, sisagua_pct_deteccao),
                   \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))) |>
  pivot_longer(-ano) |>
  ggplot(aes(ano, value)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Year", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal()
```
